system.title: System
system.languageHelp: The language applies globally to screens prepared for translation.
system.sensitiveHelp: Used for roles, assignable permissions, and base parameters. Permissions are not created from the app.
system.liveAnalyticsHelp: Controls whether Live shows metrics and demo activity. Reservation capture remains available.
system.liveAnalyticsEnabledHelp: Metrics, engagement, and visual activity are shown for presentation.
system.liveAnalyticsDisabledHelp: Only the operational product, customer, and reservation flow remains visible.
system.liveExperienceHelp: Customize the Live visual experience for your team's operation.
system.subtitle: Preferences, channels, and system controls
system.rolesTileHelp: Create roles and define which existing permissions each one includes.
system.channelsTileHelp: Enable or disable Live, door sale, door hold, and consignment globally.
system.supportLogsTileHelp: Review technical logs for configuration, routes, users, and HTTP responses.
system.securityTileHelp: Configure session expiration, failed attempts, and temporary lockout.
system.sessionsTileHelp: Unlock users and close active sessions from support.
system.securityAuditTileHelp: Review blocked access, revoked tokens, and permission events.

live.title: Live
live.actorNoAccessSubtitle: You do not have permission to operate Live
live.supportViewHelp: Support view: shows the item on air and follow-up data. It does not operate holds like the operator view.
live.operatorLiveActiveHelp: You can now register customers, items, and holds.
live.operatorNoLiveStateHelp: Start a live session to begin capturing items and reservations.
live.operatorLiveClosedHelp: This live session ended. You can review holds and activity.
live.operatorNoLiveHelp: Start a live session to begin capturing items and reservations.
live.liveSummaryPending: Detailed summary is pending for the next phase.
live.noClosedLiveReservations: This live has no registered holds.
live.noClosedLiveEvents: This live has no registered events.
live.supervisorMonitoringHelp: Supervisor view: monitors activity, holds, and live status.
live.supervisorNoDemoMetricsHelp: Viewers, active buyers, and live sales stay pending unless real data exists.
live.operatorSelectProductHelp: Select an item and mark it as product on air.
live.operatorNextChangeReservedItem: Switch or remove the item from live to continue.
live.noItemOnAirHelp: Prepare an item and press 'Put this item on air'.
live.prepareNextItemHelp: Search, scan, or create the item you will show in the live stream.
live.activeItemSectionHelp: The live item is the only item that can be held right now.
live.productOnAirHelp: Product on air is the item currently shown in the live stream and the only item that can be held right now.
live.activeItemReservationHelp: The live item is the only item that can be held right now.
live.activeItemReservedHelp: This item already has a hold. Switch it or remove it from live to continue.
live.activeItemReservedNextStepHelp: This item already has a hold. Switch it or remove it from live to continue.
live.activeItemAlreadyReservedReason: This item already has an active hold. Switch or remove the item from live to create another hold.
live.activeItemPresenterHelp: This is the item currently being shown in the stream.
live.preparedItemReservationHelp: Ready to go on air. It is not used for reservations yet.
live.noItemOnAirPresenterHelp: The operator must put an item on air to continue.
live.customerNeedsActiveItem: Put an item on air first.
live.customerNeedsPrice: Confirm the price of the item on air first.
live.reserveActiveItemHelp: Confirm the price and create the hold for the item on air.
live.reserveNeedsActiveItem: Put an item on air before creating a hold.
live.reserveMissingActiveItem: Put an item on air first.
live.priceUsesActiveItemHelp: This price applies only to the hold for the current live item. If adjusted, it does not change the item base price.
live.livePriceReadOnlyHelp: This price applies only to the hold for the current live item. You do not have permission to change the LIVE price.
live.livePriceAuthorizationHelp: Request supervisor authorization if you need to change the LIVE price.
live.authorizationPricePrompt: Select the reason to request authorization for changing the LIVE price.
live.authorizationGenericPrompt: Select the reason to request authorization for: {{action}}.
live.authorizationBackendRequired: Authorization requests still require backend integration.
live.authorizationCancelHelp: Request authorization to cancel this hold.
live.authorizationCloseHelp: Request authorization to close the live.
live.authorizationPendingRequestsEmptyMessage: When a request backend exists, pending authorizations will appear here.
live.authorizationApprovalBackendPending: Real approval remains pending backend support; no sample data is shown.
live.authorizationRequestPendingMessage: Authorization request is pending implementation. Reason: {{reason}}.
live.livePriceChangeConfirmMessage: The LIVE price {{livePrice}} differs from the suggested price {{basePrice}}. This change applies only to the current hold and does not change the item base price.
live.activeItemPriceLabel: Price of the item on air
live.itemNotAvailableForReservation: The item is not available for reservation.
live.itemReservedWithoutPaymentWarning: This item is reserved without payment. You can put it on air under operational criteria.
live.itemCannotGoOnAirPaidOrSold: This item cannot be put on air because it already has payment applied or is sold.
live.itemAvailabilityUnknownReason: The item cannot be confirmed as free to put on air.
live.clearProductOnAirHelp: Removing the item keeps the live session active and leaves no current live item.
live.changeItemOnAirHelp: Replaces the current item with the prepared item.
live.activeProductClearedMessage: The item is no longer marked as product on air.
live.minimalModeHelp: Focused single-operator flow: stream, product, customer, reservation, and closing. Demo widgets stay isolated.
live.resourceLoadError: A resource could not be loaded.
live.accessDenied: You do not have permission to access Live.
live.liveOperatePermissionError: You do not have permission to operate this stream.
live.presenterReadOnlyHelp: Presenter view: you can see the stream, but cannot modify it.
live.reservationPermissionError: You do not have permission to load Live reservations.
live.operationBlockHelp: Select, activate, or open a stream without leaving the flow.
live.operationBlockActiveHelp: Keep the operation ready to register reservations.
live.openLivesHelp: Choose where reservations will be registered.
live.liveSessionEmpty: No stream selected. Open one or choose a ready stream.
live.desktopHeaderHelp: Commercial panel for activity, product, and reservations.
live.tabletHeaderHelp: Operational console for fast reservations during the stream.
live.mobileHeaderHelp: Product, customer, and reservation in a few taps.
live.noLiveStatusBody: Select an open live or create a new one to start capturing.
live.unknownStatusBody: Review the live status before continuing.
live.noLiveActionHint: Suggested step: select an open live or enter a location to create one.
live.openLiveActionHint: Suggested step: activate the live when the broadcast or table is already operating.
live.activeLiveActionHint: Suggested step: capture reservations in the section below and close the live when finished.
live.closedLiveActionHint: This live no longer accepts reservations. Select another open live to continue.
live.unknownLiveActionHint: If the status is unclear, refresh the screen or contact support.
live.demoMetricsHelp: Visual panel with simulated data to present activity, engagement, and featured products without Facebook or realtime backend.
live.demoMetricsCollapsed: Demo metrics are hidden. You can show them for a presentation or visual validation.
live.demoEngagementHelp: Estimated interaction from comments and reactions.
live.demoCommentsHelp: Demo conversations received during the live.
live.demoCommentOne: Can you reserve that item for me?
live.demoCommentTwo: I like it. Is there another size?
live.demoActivityHelp: Simulated bars to explain engagement peaks.
live.noProductOnScreenHelp: Select an item to show it during the stream.
live.productFromRecentReservation: Last reserved item in this stream.
live.operatorConsoleHelp: Customer, item, and price in one flow.
live.noLiveEvents: No operational events have been recorded yet.
live.teamRolesHelp: Each person sees what they need to operate better.
live.spotlightLivePrompt: Product on air: create urgency and register interest.
live.spotlightSelectProductPrompt: Select an item to show it on screen.
live.presenterPanelHelp: Only what matters to talk and sell.
live.presenterNoLive: Select a stream to start operations.
live.presenterNoProduct: Select an item to show it on screen.
live.presenterReadyActive: The presenter can show this product and ask for reservations.
live.presenterReadyOpen: Product ready; activate the stream when operations start.
live.streamPulseHelp: Audience, reservations, and interaction in short form.
live.reservationRiskHelp: Confirm phone or name before creating the hold. If unsure, register as interested.
live.activateLiveModalBody: Confirm that this live is ready to start operations. After activation, the team can capture reservations in this session.
live.createLiveHelp: Start another live selling point for this branch.
live.createLiveMissingNotes: Enter the live location or notes before creating it.
live.actionInProgress: Wait until the current action finishes.
live.invalidBranch: No valid branch was found to create the live. Sign out and sign in again.
live.liveActivationError: The live could not be activated.
live.liveCreateError: The live could not be created.
live.closeConfirmNotice: Confirm if you want to close Live #{{id}}.
live.liveCloseError: The live could not be closed.
live.selectLiveToCapture: Select or create an open live to capture reservations.
live.selectCustomerHelp: Select a real or generic customer.
live.customerLoadError: Customers for this branch could not be loaded.
live.customerPermissionError: You do not have permission to load customers.
live.itemHelp: Scan or select an available item.
live.productCodeQrHelp: Use code or QR if the item already exists.
live.noOfficialActiveProduct: No official product on air yet.
live.activeProductMissingMessage: Select a live session and an item before marking a product on air.
live.activeProductLiveClosedMessage: Select an open or active live session to change the product on air.
live.activeProductUpdatedMessage: {{item}} is now the product on air.
live.activeProductUpdateError: Could not mark the product on air.
live.searchItemActionHelp: Search by code, name, or category
live.itemLoadError: Available items for this branch could not be loaded.
live.itemPermissionError: You do not have permission to load items.
live.reservationCreateError: The hold could not be created.
live.reservationIssueBody: Complete the missing information to add the hold.
live.reserveMissingLive: Start a live session before registering holds.
live.reserveMissingCustomer: Select or create a customer/interested person before reserving.
live.reserveMissingPrice: Confirm a valid price of the item on air before reserving.
live.selectOpenLiveReason: Select or create an open live.
live.selectCustomerReason: Select or create a customer/interested person before reserving.
live.priceReason: Enter a price greater than zero.
live.channelReason: The Live channel is not enabled for this branch.
live.channelDisabled: The LIVE channel is not enabled for this branch.
live.itemNotFound: No available item was found with that code.
live.noRecentReservations: There are no holds captured in this session yet.
live.markOperationalSoldHelp: Closes this hold as a sale within LIVE. It does not record payment or cash register movement.
live.operationalSoldConfirmMessage: Close this hold as a LIVE sale? This does not record payment or cash register movement.
live.operationalSoldMessage: The hold was closed as a sale within LIVE. No payment or cash register movement was recorded.
live.operationalSoldNoPaymentHelp: LIVE operational close; it does not register payment or cash movement.
live.operationalSoldPersistedNoPaymentHelp: Saved LIVE sale; it does not register payment or cash movement.
live.operationalStatusUpdatedMessage: The hold operational status was saved.
live.operationalStatusUpdateError: Could not save the hold operational status.
live.markPendingHelp: Keeps the hold active for follow-up. It does not confirm sale, payment, or cashbox.
live.cancelOperationalHelp: Cancels the operational hold for this item. It does not record payment or cash register movement.
live.cancelHoldReasonPrompt: Select the cancellation reason. This does not process payments or cashbox movements.
live.closeLiveHelp: End live session closes the full LIVE session.
live.closeLiveModalBody: After closing the live, holds can no longer be captured in this session.
live.closeLiveModalWarning: Before closing, validate that no holds are missing.
live.searchItemPlaceholder: Search by code, type, brand, or size
live.operationalCancelledMessage: The hold was operationally cancelled. No payment or cash register movement was recorded.
live.operationalHoldReactivatedMessage: The record returned to Hold for follow-up. No payment or cash register movement was recorded.
live.operationalStatusNoChangesMessage: This record was already on hold.
live.returnToReservedHelp: Returns this record to Hold for follow-up. It does not record payment or cash register movement.
live.removePreparedItemHelp: This removes the prepared item only. It does not affect the live item.
live.itemAlreadyLiveMessage: This item is already live. Select another item to prepare it as a switch.
live.prepareItemBeforeSwitch: Prepare an item first before switching.
live.preparedItemNowLiveTitle: The prepared item is now live
live.preparedItemNowLiveMessage: The prepared item is now live and ready for holds.

payments.title: Payments / Collections
payments.reservationSettledHelp: Reservation settled. New regular payments are no longer allowed from this screen.

itemsCreate.validationMessage: Complete the required fields to continue.
itemsCreate.liveReturnHelp: After creating the item, you can return to LIVE to prepare it or put it on air.
